task_completion.description: Verify the creation of 'Phone Number' and 'Carrier' custom fields within a 'Telecom Data' fieldset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Snipe-IT Custom Fields or Fieldsets settings page, look for a fieldset named 'Telecom Data' that includes the fields 'Phone Number' and 'Carrier'.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Telecom Providers' manufacturer and '5G Business SIM' model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Manufacturers list, look for 'Telecom Providers'. In the Asset Models list, look for '5G Business SIM' associated with the 'Telecom Providers' manufacturer.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'SIM Cards' asset category linked to the 'Telecom Data' fieldset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Categories list, look for an entry named 'SIM Cards' (type: Asset) that has its Fieldset column set to 'Telecom Data'.

task_completion.description: Verify SIM-001 is created with correct details and checked out to MOB-001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Assets list or asset details page, look for Asset Tag 'SIM-001' with Serial '89148000000000012345', Phone Number '800-480-1001', and Carrier 'Verizon'. The status/checkout column must show it is checked out to the asset 'MOB-001'.

task_completion.description: Verify SIM-002 is created with correct details and checked out to MOB-002.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Assets list or asset details page, look for Asset Tag 'SIM-002' with Serial '89148000000000067890', Phone Number '800-480-1002', and Carrier 'Verizon'. The status/checkout column must show it is checked out to the asset 'MOB-002'.

task_completion.description: Verify SIM-003 is created with correct details and checked out to MOB-003.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Assets list or asset details page, look for Asset Tag 'SIM-003' with Serial '89141000000000054321', Phone Number '800-410-1003', and Carrier 'AT&T'. The status/checkout column must show it is checked out to the asset 'MOB-003'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Snipe-IT web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Snipe-IT web application loaded in a web browser, not a terminal window executing database commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the SIM cards are checked out to actual Assets, not just typed as text into a user or location field.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Checked Out To' column in the Assets list should display an Asset icon/badge next to 'MOB-001', 'MOB-002', and 'MOB-003', indicating a genuine asset-to-asset checkout.

integrity.description: Verify the results are within the actual Snipe-IT environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar should show the correct local or remote URL for Snipe-IT, and standard Snipe-IT navigation menus (Dashboard, Assets, Settings) should be visible and functional.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating custom fields ('Phone Number', 'Carrier') in a 'Telecom Data' fieldset, a 'SIM Cards' category, a 'Telecom Providers' manufacturer, and a '5G Business SIM' model. Three assets must be created and checked out to specific mobile assets: SIM-001 (Serial: 89148000000000012345, Phone: 800-480-1001, Carrier: Verizon) to MOB-001; SIM-002 (Serial: 89148000000000067890, Phone: 800-480-1002, Carrier: Verizon) to MOB-002; SIM-003 (Serial: 89141000000000054321, Phone: 800-410-1003, Carrier: AT&T) to MOB-003. The checkouts must be to the Assets themselves, not users.
